name: confirmIdea(AFFIRM) architect sync happy path — design in response, graph at SPEC_WRITER_FORMALIZE (PHASE-20 Step 3)
description: RED (before Step 3): architect not invoked, architect_design absent from response, graph stays at ARCHITECT_DESIGN. GREEN: mock architect called, design in response, architect_design.json persisted, graph.current_state === 'SPEC_WRITER_FORMALIZE'.
